headline: SMX’s Technology Provides Global Standards for Recycled Plastic
summary: By Karen Roman Plastic is entering “The Age of Parity” as the cost of recycled plastics and virgin plastics comes closer due to changes in global materials markets caused by […]

headline: How Much Upside is Left in Zebra (ZBRA)? Wall Street Analysts Think 27.96%
summary: The average of price targets set by Wall Street analysts indicates a potential upside of 28% in Zebra (ZBRA). While the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric is questionable, the positive trend in earnings estimate revisions might translate into an upside in the stock.
